zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford於1175年出生在英國維爾爾歐阿可時，他的父親Humphrey III de Bohun11172歲，母親Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford30歲。他於大約1200年與Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1199年被列為lord high constable of england。他去世於1220年6月1日在巴勒斯坦享年45歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford于1175年出生在英国維爾爾歐阿可时，他的父亲Humphrey III de Bohun11172岁，母亲Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford30岁。他于大约1200年与Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1199年被列为lord high constable of england。他去世于1220年6月1日在巴勒斯坦享年45岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovak (Behúň) and Rusyn (from Slovakia; also Behún): nickname from Slovak behúň (Rusyn bihun) ‘fast runner’.
Irish: from Ó Beachain or Ó Beathain, see Behan . This form of the surname is almost extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Behan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Conan, Aileen.
Irish (southern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beachain ‘descendant of Beachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of beach ‘bee’.
Irish (southern): perhaps from Ó Beathain ‘descendant of Beathán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare Bean 5 and McBeth .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford was born in 1175, in Oaksey, Wiltshire, England, his father, Humphrey III de Bohun, was 11172 and his mother, Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, was 30. He married Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex about 1200. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1199, at the age of 24, his occupation is listed as lord high constable of england. He died on 1 June 1220, in Palestine, at the age of 45, and was buried in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford est né en 1175, à Oaksey, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey III de Bohun, avait 11172 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex environ 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1199, à l’âge de 24 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord high constable of england. Il est décédé le 1 juin 1220, à Palestine, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford 1175 in Oaksey, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey III de Bohun 11172 und seine Mutter Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford 30. Er hat um 1200 Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1199, als er 24 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord high constable of england aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. Juni 1220 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Palästina und wurde in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

ht.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford è nato il nel 1175 nel Oaksey, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Humphrey III de Bohun, aveva 11172 anni e il suo madre, Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex circa 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1199, all'età di 24 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord high constable of england. Morì il 1 giugno 1220, nel Palestina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Herefordが1175年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアオアクシーで生まれた時，父Humphrey III de Bohunは11172歳，母Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Herefordは30歳であった。約1200年にMaud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essexと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1199年，24歳の時，職業はlord high constable of englandと記録されている。彼は1220年6月1日にパレスチナで45歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアランソニー セクウンダ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford(이)가 1175년 영국 윌츠히르 크시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey III de Bohun(은)는 11172세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1200년 Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1199년, 24세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord high constable of england이었다. 그는 1220년 6월 1일 팔레스타인에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 랜서니 세쿤다 프리오리에 묻혔다.

mg.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

mn.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Trefynwy, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford nasceu em 1175, em Oaksey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey III de Bohun, tinha 11172 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex aproximadamente 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1199, com 24 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord high constable of england. Ele faleceu em 1 de junho de 1220, em Palestina, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford родился в 1175 г. в местности оакси, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey III de Bohun было 11172 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex около 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1199 году, в возрасте 24 лет,  он работал по профессии lord high constable of england. Он умер 1 июня 1220 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности ллантони секунда приори, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Bohun 1st Earl of Hereford nació en 1175, en Oaksey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey III de Bohun, tenía 11172 años y su mamá, Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Maud FitzGeoffrey Countess of Hereford and Essex aproximadamente 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1199, a la edad de 24 años, su ocupación registrada era lord high constable of england. Murió el 1 de junio de 1220, en Palestina, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
